notes: Do what the guys suggesting you change the options.txt say and it works perfectly from what i saw.
title: Field of Glory II

notes:
My options.txt doesn't have Fullscreen in it, so I can't set i `Fullscreen 0`. 

I looked via

sean@sean-desktop:/$ grep -i full  '/home/sean/extra/SteamLibrary/steamapps/common/Field of Glory II/Core/UI/Options.txt'
// ------------ Full Screen // Windowed ---------
string IDS_OPT_FULLSCREEN_ON
string IDS_OPT_FULLSCREEN_OFF
string IDS_OPT_FULLSCREEN_OFF_FRAMED


All those "string" options seem to be associated with specific resolutions, but I can't just set something to 0 like the other folks suggest.  I get the "failed to created device for rendering.

I trad setting `PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%` as a launch option as other folks suggested, still no dice.

really sad. wanted to try this game.
title: Field of Glory II

gpu: ATI Technologies Inc. AMD Radeon RX 480
notes:
Had the same 'shader model 3.0' error and tried to find OPTIONS.txt at '~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/660160/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/FieldOfGlory2', but it was not there. I found a quite good hint at 'https://steamcommunity.com/app/660160/discussions/0/1744479063998845036/' to simply build that file if you do not find it. I included 'RezX xxxx (width of yr current display setting) | 
RezY yyyy (height of yr current display setting) |
Fullscreen 0' and the game started like a linux native.
title: Field of Glory II

notes: Installed and Ran Tutorial Mission Fine without any tweaks
